name: sqlitewasmblazor-crypto-typescript
description: Plane-2 worker bundle: plain SQLite engine + PRF-keyed at-rest encryption (vfs-prf, crypto-header, crypto-permissions, crypto-delta, worker-manifest). Plane-2-only consumers ship this bundle from _content/SqliteWasmBlazor.Crypto/; plane-1-only consumers ship a smaller bundle from _content/SqliteWasmBlazor/.

scripts.build: npm run build:worker && npm run build:bridge && npm run copy:wasm
scripts.build:release: npm run build:worker:release && npm run build:bridge:release && npm run copy:wasm
